The '''RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate''' was a deadly criminal organization known to have been on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] or [[Hok/Legends|Hok]]. It consisted mainly of [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] members, such as [[Byhdee Kees]] and [[Jaw-knee Rise]]. Due to a number of members possessing bounties on their heads, the group's numbers decreased on Malastare thanks to the coincidental appearance of the notorious [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Company-stub}}
